title: She Had No Idea They Was Gonna Play In Her Face
about:
She Had No Idea They Was Gonna Play In Her Face is a catchphrase most commonly associated with the Real Estate Fish, also known as Incidental 49A, from SpongeBob SquarePants and the character's memes. The phrase was first used alongside an image of the Real Estate Fish knocking on Squidward's front door by X / Twitter user @Bryan60112 in mid-March 2026.

The phrase was further popularized over the following months, often still associated with the fish, but sometimes referring to other people who are about to be "played" or messed with. It saw a resurgence in virality in late May 2026 on X / Twitter.
origin: On March 14th, 2026, X[1] user @Bryan60112 posted an image of the Real Estate Fish from SpongeBob, amid the virality of memes about the fish on sites like TikTok, writing, "She had no idea they was gonna play in her face," garnering over 60,000 likes and 6,200 reposts in two months. This is the earliest known instance of the meme.
